codex_runtime_jobs_one_active_run_execut.name: codex_runtime_jobs_one_active_run_execution_per_codex_session
codex_runtime_jobs_one_active_run_execut.where: "codex_runtime_jobs"."target_kind" = 'run_execution' and "codex_runtime_jobs"."codex_session_id" is not null and "codex_runtime_jobs"."input_json"->>'schema_version' = 'codex_run_execution_workload.v1' and "codex_runtime_jobs"."status" in ('queued','accepted','materializing','running')
